meta.title: The Decisions and Uncertainty in OT Recovery
meta.description: Pete Anderla works for Kimberly-Clark where they need to prepare to recover from OT cyber incidents. Pete shares details and stories of the challenges Kimberly-Clark OT recovery faces and how they are working through them. A lot of the harder issues were people related. He ends with some security automation challenges for the S4 community to reduce the burden on the team.
